params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results per page

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of all API projects in the authenticated organization. Each project contains one or more API versions defined by OpenAPI specifications.
Creates a new API project in the authenticated organization. The project will hold OpenAPI specifications and serve as the container for generated SDKs, documentation, and mock servers.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Returns the details of a specific API project by its unique identifier, including project metadata, versions, and associated tooling.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Updates the metadata of an existing API project, including the project name, description, and configuration settings.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Permanently deletes an API project and all associated versions, generated SDKs, documentation, and mock server configurations.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Returns all versions of an API project. Each version corresponds to a distinct OpenAPI specification uploaded to the project.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Uploads a new OpenAPI specification to create a new version of the API project. Accepts OpenAPI 3.0 and 3.1 specifications in JSON or YAML format and runs Sideko linting before accepting the version.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

params.name: versionId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API version

params.name: format
params.description: Preferred output format for the downloaded specification

items.docs: Returns the raw OpenAPI specification (JSON or YAML) for a specific API project version. Matches the CLI command `sideko api version download`.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Runs Sideko's OpenAPI linting rules against a project version and returns any blocking or advisory linting errors that would prevent SDK, MCP, or mock generation.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Returns all SDK generation jobs for an API project across all target languages, including their status and download URLs when complete.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Initiates an SDK generation job for the specified API project version and target programming language. The job runs asynchronously and the resulting SDK can be downloaded when the status is complete.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

params.name: sdkId
params.description: Unique identifier of the SDK generation job

items.docs: Returns the status and details of a specific SDK generation job. When the status is complete, a download URL is provided to retrieve the generated SDK archive.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Returns all Model Context Protocol (MCP) server generation jobs for an API project, including their status and download URLs when complete.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Initiates a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server generation job for the specified API project version. The job produces an MCP server exposing one tool per OpenAPI operation so AI agents (Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT, Copilot) can call the API through structured MCP tools.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

params.name: mcpId
params.description: Unique identifier of the MCP generation job

items.docs: Returns the status and details of a specific MCP server generation job. When the status is complete, a download URL is provided to retrieve the generated MCP server archive.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Returns all documentation sites deployed for the API project, including their deployment status, URLs, and configuration.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Deploys or updates an API documentation site for the specified project version. Sideko generates and hosts a fully-featured documentation portal with interactive examples, authentication guides, and API reference pages.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Returns all mock server instances deployed for the API project, including their status, endpoint URLs, and configuration.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

items.docs: Deploys a mock server for the specified API project version. The mock server automatically generates realistic responses based on the OpenAPI specification schemas and examples.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API project

params.name: serverId
params.description: Unique identifier of the mock server

items.docs: Permanently shuts down and removes a mock server instance. All traffic to the mock server endpoint will fail after deletion.
Returns all API keys for the authenticated organization, including their names, scopes, and creation timestamps. Key values are masked for security.
Creates a new API key for the authenticated organization. The full key value is only returned once at creation time and cannot be retrieved again.

params.name: keyId
params.description: Unique identifier of the API key

items.docs: Permanently revokes and deletes an API key. Any requests using the deleted key will be rejected immediately.
